caption: In a lecture hall or conference room with red walls and neutral-toned paneling, a woman with short gray hair stands at a podium, addressing an audience seated in rows of black chairs. She wears a light blue top and appears to be speaking or presenting. Behind her are brown window blinds and a white wall with small signs. Several people sit with their backs to the camera, including a woman in a blue and red patterned top and another in a yellow shirt. A man in a dark vest stands near the podium. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, and the audience remains seated while the speaker continues her presentation. A white graphic overlay containing the text "ORCA" is visible in the lower right of each scene. The room is illuminated by overhead rectangular fluorescent lights and contains a ceiling-mounted projector.
